refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation communication quality such that packet loss does not exceed the customer-defined limit under agreed network conditions.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR clarifies the performance metric (packet loss) and the operational context (agreed network conditions), enabling targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure packet loss percentage during teleoperation sessions under controlled network conditions and compare against customer-defined limits.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report communication quality status to relevant modules.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement robust error correction and retransmission protocols.
DP2: Use adaptive bitrate and compression algorithms to optimize data flow.
DP3: Prioritize teleoperation packets over other data streams.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement robust error correction and retransmission protocols.

potential_sources: Interaction between error correction and network link quality.
Dependency on teleoperation data flow timing.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically isolates packet loss control within communication protocols, minimizing coupling with other system functions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes network conditions are within agreed parameters.
Risk that error correction overhead may increase latency affecting teleoperation responsiveness.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating adaptive bitrate (DP2) if latency impact is unacceptable.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Software module responsible for teleoperation communication management and control.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Interface for sending and receiving teleoperation data packets over the network.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Interface to report communication quality metrics to the NGHE Solution module.

module_containment_scores.notes: High-level system module; contains overall teleoperation but not detailed packet loss control.
Physical vehicle module; minimal direct involvement in teleoperation packet loss control.
Primary module for teleoperation communication; best containment for DP1.
Safety monitoring may receive alerts but does not control packet loss.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Placing packet loss control DP within Teleoperation module centralizes communication quality management, reducing diffusion and improving maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential latency impact on teleoperation responsiveness if error correction is not optimized.
Dependency on Network Link interface quality and stability.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor latency impact and consider offloading some adaptive functions to NGHE Solution if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP (error correction and retransmission) directly addresses the refined FR of maintaining packet loss within limits.

diffusion_risks: Error correction logic diffusion if implemented across multiple modules.
Potential interface complexity with Network Link.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Assigning DP to Teleoperation module minimizes diffusion and aligns ownership with functionality.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and network packet analysis is feasible within Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of responsibility for packet loss control to Teleoperation module.

recommended_revisions: Evaluate latency impact of error correction protocols during integration testing.
Define clear interface contracts for Network Link to ensure stable communication.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition sufficiently refines the FR, selects a suitable DP, and assigns it to an appropriate IM with manageable risks and clear verification paths.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report communication quality status to relevant modules.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Network conditions remain within agreed parameters.
Error correction protocols can be optimized to avoid excessive latency.
evidence_needed: Latency measurements during teleoperation with error correction enabled.
Packet loss statistics under various network conditions.
